---
title: "Layers, Contributor Values, and RAT Metadata"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Layers, Contributor Values, and RAT Metadata}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

BlueTopo source GeoTIFFs currently contain elevation, uncertainty, and
contributor bands. Contributor values are identifiers; use the RAT sidecar for
metadata context.
